title: AgentLens Configuration
description: Configuration file for AgentLens – M365 Copilot Agent linter and validator

rules.description: Override rule severities. Keys are rule IDs (e.g. INST-005), values are 'error', 'warning', 'info', or 'off'.

instruction_min_length.description: Minimum recommended instruction length in characters

instruction_ideal_range.description: Ideal instruction length range [min, max] in characters

custom_blocked_phrases.description: Custom phrases that should not appear in instructions

require_conversation_starters_min.description: Minimum number of conversation starters required

schema_version_target.description: Target schema version for upgrade recommendations

client_id.description: Entra App Registration client ID for Graph API access

dataverse.description: Dataverse connection settings for Copilot Studio agent scanning

org_urls.description: Multiple Dataverse organization URLs to scan
